title: Architectural Building Wand
description: An advanced drag-and-drop construction tool and structure builder. Effortlessly place blocks, build walls, and fill areas in survival using a balanced ghost block preview planner.
body:
![Architectural Building Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e431ba1092e94f18e12810acb7133550e974d8a5_0.webp)

A sophisticated architectural tool designed for precision and speed. Using a seamless "Drag and Drop" mechanic, this mod allows you to construct complex structures with ease. Featuring a Planner Mode for full visualization before execution, it is perfectly balanced for Survival mode, ensuring a professional building experience without compromising game progression or balance.

![Media](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6a05f604223b4a3b57f952c6c908cf8d849236c_0.webp)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IzUz558uu6M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Key Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03f53e25e6021d2ee2bb1613c2662add47bca67a_0.webp)

- **Drag & Drop Construction**: No complex point-marking required. Simply click and drag to define your structure, then release to build instantly.

- **Planner Mode**: Preview structures as "ghost blocks" to visualize the final result and adjust dimensions before committing any resources.

- **Survival Balanced**: Every aspect, including the Eraser tool, is tuned for Survival mode, respecting resource costs and tool durability.

- **Flexible Geometry**: Supports Walls, Surfaces, Circles, and Triangles, with full control over orientation (Vertical/Horizontal).

- **Advanced Eraser**: Remove blocks with the same geometric precision used for building, fully balanced for survival gameplay.
  
- **Custom Shortcuts**: Access all modes instantly via a radial menu (default: V) or fully rebindable keys.

![How to Use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa63f2dec27b85daecf205c55d3e9417c8743a8e_0.webp)

1. **Radial Menu**: Press V (default) to open the mode selection wheel.

2. **Building**: After selecting a mode, click on the ground, drag to scale your shape, and release to build.

3. **Resources**: Ensure the blocks you wish to build with are in your Offhand (Left hand).

4. **Quick Controls** (Scroll):

- **In Radial Menu (V)**: Hover over an icon and scroll to toggle between "Wall" and "Surface" modes.

- **During Preview**: Scroll to change the build axis.

- **Block Orientation**: Use Shift + Scroll during preview to rotate the individual block direction.

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab75c31ce57a36ad2a472eec6bdf6f86bf83cb34_0.webp)

The wand is available in multiple tiers (Redstone, Emerald, Diamond). Higher tiers offer:

- Increased block placement limits per operation.

- Faster building and erasing speeds.

- Extended reach for larger projects.

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c58b1d010a876fd1d5052d2457532e7a86a73049.png)

![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f31bd5d9f57b688fda9254fdf1270e8cd4b0c7c1_0.webp)

The mod is fully compatible with the following loaders:
Fabric | Forge | NeoForge
